name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-24
title: read_branch silently skips items with malformed JSON; no logging or test coverage
description: branch_ops.read_branch wraps json.loads in a try/except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError) and silently 'continue's on failure. Corrupted item.json files vanish from list-items.py output with no diagnostic. No test exercises this branch (the except clause is unreachable in tests). Fix: at minimum log a warning to stderr; ideally also surface a 'corrupted: N items' summary line in list-items.py output.
